prototype_decision.selected_output: Create a standalone static index.html sandbox preview plan for the Tu Ruta de Claridad section.
prototype_decision.reason: The section has approved product and UI specs, and the next safe step is a local static browser prototype, not a production app.

html_structure.document: HTML5 document with language attribute and viewport meta.
html_structure.main_landmark: main element containing a single section for Tu Ruta de Claridad.
html_structure.section: section with aria-labelledby pointing to the visible title.
html_structure.heading: h2 or h1 depending on page context; sandbox may use h1 for isolated section.
html_structure.path_map: ordered visual group of 4 milestone cards connected by decorative curved path.
html_structure.cta: single anchor/button styled as primary CTA with href or data-route intent /simulador.
html_structure.trust_note: small paragraph near CTA stating referential/subject-to-validation boundary.

css_structure.layout: centered 16:9-friendly section, max-width container, responsive fallback below desktop.
css_structure.tokens: local CSS custom properties for warm background, navy text, green CTA and minimal gold accent.
css_structure.cards: soft radius, subtle shadow, breathable spacing.
css_structure.path: decorative SVG or CSS curve; not a flat timeline or checkout stepper.
css_structure.states: hover/focus-visible for cards and CTA; reduced-motion media query.

accessibility_baseline: Use semantic main/section/header/list structure where possible.
CTA must be keyboard-focusable with visible focus state.
Decorative connector path must be aria-hidden.
Milestone content must be readable without relying only on color.
Avoid fake form controls or disabled-looking interactive elements.
interaction_states: Default: all milestones visible and CTA available.
Hover: subtle elevation only; no new claims appear.
Focus: visible outline/ring on CTA and meaningful interactive elements.
forbidden_runtime_scope: No payment or real data integration.
No VALIDATED or Golden Screen label.
validation_checklist: Exactly one dominant CTA: Ver si tengo una oferta.
No sensitive data fields are present.
No guarantee, amount, approval or savings promise appears.
Visual structure remains path/map, not dashboard/timeline/checkout.
Can be opened locally as index.html with no install step.
Accessibility baseline is visible in markup/CSS.
local_run_instructions: Save the file as index.html in the approved sandbox path.
Open index.html directly in Chrome, Edge or another browser.
No npm install, build command, server, backend or environment variables are required.

handoff_to_next.notes: This is a sandbox spec only. Actual HTML file creation is a separate controlled action.

traceability.security_hold_context: ACT-0051 remains on hold until full rerun closure and security gate decision.
